recommendations.title: One Night in Miami...
recommendations.overview: In the aftermath of Cassius Clay's defeat of Sonny Liston in 1964, the boxer meets with Malcolm X, Sam Cooke and Jim Brown to change the course of history in the segregated South.

recommendations.title: The Tracey Fragments

recommendations.title: Wish Upon a Star
recommendations.overview: A younger sister wishes to switch places with her popular older sister and the two bickering siblings awaken to find the wish has come true.

recommendations.title: The Care Bears Movie
recommendations.overview: The Care Bears team up with a troubled brother and sister who just moved to a new town to help a neglected young magician's apprentice whose evil spell book causes sinister things to happen.

recommendations.title: Wish Dragon
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Determined teen Din is longing to reconnect with his childhood best friend when he meets a wish-granting dragon who shows him the magic of possibilities.

recommendations.title: Golmaal Again
recommendations.overview: Gopal and his best friends are back again, and this time they move back to their old neighborhood in a new palatial house where they learn that it is being haunted by a ghost.
